rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow registration of users, patients, and caregivers to access all website resources.
The system shall authenticate users to provide access permissions.
The system shall grant access to all options available on the website.
The system shall terminate user access to the website upon logout.
The system shall enable users to purchase insurance and pay for healthcare services consumed.
The system shall provide detailed information on all diseases.
The system shall facilitate online delivery of medicines, considering doctor's statements and patient's willingness.
The system shall provide information on health awareness and prevailing threats.
The system shall manage payment for services consumed, including doctor's fees and online medicine delivery charges.
The system shall collect user reviews for the website through feedback mechanisms.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Register users, patients or caregivers to access all resources
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: this functionality acts as a membership functionality that allows the users, patients or caregivers to register into this website to access all the resources.
Login – this functionality authenticates the user to provide access permissions.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide access to all options available on the website
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Facilities – this functionality allows us to access all the options available on the website.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: End user access to the website
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Logout – this functionality ends the access to the website.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to purchase insurance or pay for healthcare services consumed
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Finance – this functionality allows to purchase insurance, or to pay for healthcare services consumed.
Health A–Z – this functionality provides details of all the diseases.

Drugs and supplements – this functionality provides online delivery of medicines. This functionality takes the doctor’s statement for the issue of medicine and the patient’s willingness to buy it online.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide health awareness and threats prevailing
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: News and experts – this functionality provides health awareness and threats that are prevailing.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Deal with payment for services consumed
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Payment – this functionality deals with the payment for the services consumed. This functionality is split into two sub-functions namely, payment for doctors, for the services issued and payment for online med-delivery.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Collect user reviews for the website
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Feedback – this functionality collects user reviews for this website.
